ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "equation" TEXT /* Chemical equation of the reaction */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* Enzyme Commission (EC) number associated with the reaction */,
  "gene_association" TEXT /* Gene association for the reaction */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the reaction rate */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the reaction rate */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective value for the reaction (if applicable) */,
  "compartment" TEXT /* Compartment where the reaction occurs */,
  "miriam" TEXT /* MIRIAM annotations for the reaction */,
  "subsystem" TEXT /* Subsystem or pathway to which the reaction belongs */,
  "pH_range" TEXT /* pH range in which the reaction occurs */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in which the reaction occurs */,
  "reaction_energy" REAL /* Energy change associated with the reaction */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations for the reaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "enzyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* Enzyme Commission (EC) number */,
  "gene_association" TEXT /* Gene association for the enzyme */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the enzyme is found */,
  "pathways" TEXT /* Pathways in which the enzyme is involved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enzyme */,
  "isoenzyme" TEXT /* Information about isoenzymes */,
  "regulatory_mechanism" TEXT /* Information about the regulatory mechanisms of the enzyme */,
  "inhibitors" TEXT /* Information about known inhibitors of the enzyme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the gene is found */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* DNA strand on which the gene is located */,
  "transcription_start_site" TEXT /* Transcription start site of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic ID of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "genome_size" TEXT /* Size of the organism's genome */,
  "taxonomy_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "kegg_id" TEXT /* KEGG ID of the pathway */,
  "organism_id" TEXT /* ID of the organism in which the pathway occurs */,
  "pathway_length" INTEGER /* Number of reactions in the pathway */,
  "pathway_complexity" TEXT /* Measure of the pathway's complexity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the reaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the reaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the reaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "reaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the reaction */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the reaction */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "reaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the reaction related to the publication */,
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
